discoveries: import must come BEFORE module docblock (/-! ... -/) in Lean 4 — docblock goes AFTER imports
INT16_MIN/INT16_MAX: use simp only [INT16_MIN, INT16_MAX] at * before omega
prefix is a reserved keyword in Lean 4 — use pfx/sfx
CRC-32 is LSBIT-first; CRC-64-WE is MSBIT-first
FVSquad.lean AND Basic.lean must both explicitly import new files
lemma is NOT a keyword in Lean 4.29 stdlib (without Mathlib) — use theorem
Int.min_le_left, Int.min_le_right, Int.le_min, Int.min_eq_left/right available in stdlib
Int.le_max_left, Int.le_max_right, Int.max_le, Int.max_eq_left/right available in stdlib
Int.min_assoc, Int.max_assoc, Int.min_comm, Int.max_comm available in stdlib
neg_min/neg_max proofs: by_cases h : a ≤ b + rw [min_eq_left h, max_eq_left (neg_le_neg h)] pattern works
Duality proof pattern: rw [show -(min X Y) = max (-X) (-Y) from neg_min_aux _ _]
CRC-8/DVB-S2 poly 0xD5: crc8 [0xFF] = 0xF9; always verify concrete values with native_decide
computeT3 proof: simp [max_def] + linarith covers all cases
For radians/degrees: abstract pi as axiom; use field_simp + ring for round-trip
